title: Webinar today: Bring your hardest monday apps questions and win swag!

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re doing a developer Q&A session today at 16:00 UTC/11:00 EST. Sign up here!

I’ll be there to answer your toughest monday apps questions. If I don’t know the answer, you’ll win some swag!

If you can’t make today’s session, there will be another session next week at the same time. See you there

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: oops I missed this one Sure I can think of a few

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
@basdebruin

We’ll look forward to your questions on the session next week then Thanks for your interest in the webinar.

-Alex
